description_long: This object consists of two classic footballs, one larger and one smaller, both featuring the iconic black-and-white pentagonal and hexagonal panel pattern. The surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, with sharp, well-defined edges between the panels. The footballs appear to be made of synthetic leather or polyurethane, with visible seams suggesting a stitched or thermally bonded construction. The overall shape is perfectly spherical, and the panels are evenly distributed, giving a professional and new appearance. There are no visible logos, text, or branding on either ball, and both are free from scuffs, dirt, or signs of wear. The footballs are shown stacked vertically, with the smaller one resting directly above the larger one.
description: Two pristine, black-and-white footballs of different sizes are stacked vertically, each with a classic pentagonal and hexagonal panel design and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both footballs side by side, highlighting their spherical shape and classic black-and-white panel pattern.
description_view_1: Top-down view with the smaller football directly above the larger one, emphasizing their size difference and alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same panel pattern and relative positioning of the footballs.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view with the smaller football stacked on top of the larger one, mirroring the top-down perspective.
